metric_name: EMachines: buying tips for week of 2003-01-05
metric_value: EMachines unveiled two of its four new desktop models. BestBuy already has advertised deals on the new T2042 and T1842.
notes: Extracted from "EMachines" section

metric_name: Dell: buying tips for week of 2003-01-05
metric_value: This is not the week to find the best deals on a 2350 from Dell. For more than you would have paid last week you no longer get a DVD-ROM.
notes: Extracted from "Dell" section

metric_name: Gateway: buying tips for week of 2003-01-05
metric_value: Gateway has changed its offers this week. The best deal in the 300 line is no longer the 300L Special, but the 300S Value.
notes: Extracted from "Gateway" section

metric_name: Sony: buying tips for week of 2003-01-05
metric_value: As happens from time to time, the best deals on Sony PCs can be found at Sony's own site. Sony Online offers free overnight shipping on all Viao desktops as well as $100 mail-in rebates.
notes: Extracted from "Sony" section

metric_name: HP and Compaq: buying tips for week of 2003-01-05
